## APIKeyAuth interface

Authentication via a traditional Stripe API key (sk_test\_\*, sk_live\_\*, rk\_\*). Uses `Authorization: Bearer <apiKey>`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface APIKeyAuth
```
